Anurag, who served us, was really friendly and recommended the coffee. His suggestion was spot on!

reviews.comment:
I recently tried the Irish Cappuccino and Mocha Espresso along with the Tiramisu Paris Brest everything was absolutely delightful! Coffee was rich, aromatic, and perfectly balanced, while the dessert was beautifully presented and indulgently delicious. A perfect combination for coffee and dessert lovers alike.

Special thanks to Anurag for his excellent service — attentive, friendly, and truly made the experience memorable. Highly recommended!

reviewReply.comment: We’re so glad you enjoyed the Irish Cappuccino, Mocha Espresso, and Tiramisu Paris Brest, that’s a perfect trio indeed! It’s wonderful to know the experience and service stood out for you. Can’t wait to welcome you back for more delightful coffee moments at Coffee Island! ☕
